wikitext.*:
==={{aniseries|JN}}===
In ''[[JN037|That New Old Gang of Mine!]]'', Kukui greeted Ash upon his arrival in Alola and met [[Goh]]. He took them home, where Ash was reunited with his Alolan team and Kukui introduced him to his newborn son [[Lei]].

In ''[[JN096|Lighting the Way Home!]]'', Kukui appeared in a flashback.

In ''[[JN112|Helping the Hometown Hero!]]'', Kukui with his family attended a party to celebrate the return of Lusamine and her family after they found [[Mohn]]. Kukui also reunited with Ash and Goh, and met [[Chloe]]. The next day, Kukui participated in a [[Battle Royal]] match between Ash, Kiawe, and Gladion. Kukui was able to defeat Gladion and Kiawe, but the results between him and Ash was left unknown after they used their signature Z-Moves.

In ''[[JN131|Paring Pokémon While Parrying!]]'' and ''[[JN132|Partners in Time!]]'', Professor Kukui was seen watching Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}} at the [[Pokémon School]].
